title: How Iran is using China’s playbook to counter Donald Trump’s threats
content: Nearly six weeks of fighting between Iran and the United States have paused, but tensions remain after talks failed. Donald Trump has increased pressure by threatening to block the Strait of Hormuz, a key global oil route. Iran is responding by using control of the strait as leverage, similar to how China earlier countered US pressure using rare-earth supplies. This has already pushed oil prices higher and raised concerns over fuel costs and inflation. Iran has shown no sign of backing down, signalling a longer standoff ahead

title: Google CEO Sundar Pichai has a message for all American technology companies
content: Google CEO Sundar Pichai urged US tech companies to lead global AI development, emphasizing its profound impact and the need for responsible innovation to benefit all Americans. He highlighted AI's transformative applications in medicine, education, and emergency response, while also acknowledging challenges like workforce disruption and the need for retraining and regulation.

title: Don Tzu and the art of war (only winning, no losing)
content: Today we bear witness to said winning, in a way that greatest strategic philosophers of yore: Chanakya, Machiavelli, and obviously Sun Tzu could never have conceived.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi falls for golden duck; Kavya Maran's wild celebration goes viral
content: Youngster Vaibhav Sooryavanshi faced a rare failure in the IPL 2026 clash against Sunrisers Hyderabad. He was dismissed for a golden duck by pacer Praful Hinge. Wicketkeeper Ishan Kishan and Salil Arora combined for the catch. The Sunrisers Hyderabad dugout, including owner Kavya Maran, erupted in celebration. Sooryavanshi walked back to the pavilion in disbelief after an uncharacteristic off day.

title: 'Cherry tomatoes and beets': World's oldest captive gorilla celebrates 69th birthday at Berlin Zoo
content: Fatou, the world's oldest captive gorilla, celebrated her 69th birthday at the Berlin Zoo with a special, sugar-free meal. Arriving in 1959, she is a western lowland gorilla whose exact birth date is unknown but officially celebrated on April 13. Despite her age and health challenges, Fatou remains friendly with her keepers.

title: FBI takes down website that stole millions from internet users across the world
content: A sophisticated global phishing operation, centered around the "W3LL phishing kit," has been dismantled by the FBI and Indonesian authorities. This "full-service" platform enabled cybercriminals to steal thousands of account credentials and attempt over $20 million in fraud. The alleged developer was detained in Indonesia, marking a significant blow to cybercrime.

title: Jadeja inpects Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's bat, asks 'Ye tune karwaya hai ki ... ' - WATCH
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in IPL 2026 with his aggressive batting, earning him the Orange Cap.  His explosive partnership with Yashasvi Jaiswal is a key highlight for Rajasthan Royals.  Sooryavanshi is also nearing a significant T20 milestone, showcasing remarkable talent and a fearsome strike rate.

title: TCS CEO on IT dying by 2030: Companies will need more services for AI
content: TCS CEO K Krithivasan dismisses predictions of India's IT sector becoming obsolete by 2030, asserting that AI will amplify the need for IT services. He highlights the industry's resilience due to deep skill sets, not just cost.

title: Trump’s blockade of Strait of Hormuz begins: How will India be impacted?
content: The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow stretch which is important for global trade flows, and is alone responsible for the transit of a fifth of the world’s oil supply. Asian economies like India and China source a big chunk of their crude oil, LPG, and LNG requirements via this strait.

title: Abhishek Sharma breaks Rohit Sharma, Sanju Samson 'unwanted' records
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad's Abhishek Sharma was dismissed for a golden duck by Jofra Archer in their IPL 2026 clash against Rajasthan Royals. This marked the 24th instance of RR taking a wicket before conceding a run, an IPL record.

title: Blocking what is already closed: Why Trump is blockading Hormuz Strait
content: President Trump has threatened to blockade the Strait of Hormuz. This move aims to increase pressure on Iran. The waterway is crucial for global oil shipments. Iran has already been limiting access. Trump's action risks further disruption to oil flows. This could lead to higher global oil prices. The US has previously allowed some Iranian oil sales.

title: NFL reporter Melanie Collins stuns fans with offseason beach snap
content: Melanie Collins closed her eighth NFL season with CBS after covering the NFC Championship Game, continuing her steady rise as a trusted sideline reporter. Working alongside Kevin Harlan and Trent Green, she has become a consistent presence in high-profile broadcasts. With a background that includes ESPN, Yahoo Sports, and major global events, Collins brings depth and versatility to her role. As the offseason begins, she is taking time away before an expected return for the next NFL season.

title: Mike Vrabel faces backlash amid Dianna Russini hot tub scandal
content: New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel skipped a scheduled media session amid controversy involving Dianna Russini, following photos of them together in Arizona. While both denied any inappropriate relationship, Russini faces an internal review at The Athletic. Fans questioned Vrabel’s absence, calling it evasive, though some believe it was a strategic move to avoid distractions as the team focuses on upcoming draft preparations.

title: Dianna Russini faces backlash after old comments on husband resurface
content: Dianna Russini faces mounting backlash after old podcast comments about her marriage resurfaced amid viral photos with Mike Vrabel. While both deny any wrongdoing, public reaction has blurred the line between personal humor and professional credibility. The Athletic has defended Russini, but an internal review signals the seriousness of the situation as scrutiny continues to grow.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' day 26: Ranveer Singh film chases Rs 1100 crore milestone on 4th Monday
content: Aditya Dhar’s espionage masterpiece, 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', continues its record-shattering journey at the box office. On day 26 (fourth Monday), the Ranveer Singh-starrer has officially amassed over Rs 1,084 crore India net, solidifying its status as the highest-grossing Hindi film in history. Despite the intense IPL 2026 season, the film's strategic family-friendly edits and viral momentum have pushed its worldwide gross past the Rs 1,712 crore mark. Check out the detailed live tracking and daily collection breakdown here.

title: Happy Puthandu: Top 50 Tamil new year wishes & quotes to share with your loved ones
content: Puthandu, the Tamil New Year, ushers in a period of hope, prosperity, and new beginnings. Celebrated globally by Tamil communities, it involves home cleaning, festive meals, and temple visits. As Puthandu 2026 approaches on April 14, heartfelt wishes and messages are shared to convey warmth and joy, emphasizing gratitude and cultural pride.

title: 'Under Sanju bhaiya ... ': Riyan Parag's special mention for Samson at toss
content: Rajasthan Royals captain Riyan Parag, reflecting on his journey to leadership, acknowledged the guidance of former captain Sanju Samson. Parag, who took over captaincy ahead of IPL 2026, expressed gratitude for the support received. Sunrisers Hyderabad skipper Ishan Kishan also discussed the impact of leadership on his game and team performance.

title: Out of missiles: US allies in Gulf turn to Asia for more ammo
content: Gulf nations, facing depleted air defence stockpiles due to sustained air bombardment, are urgently seeking alternative weapons suppliers beyond the US. Saudi Arabia, UAE, and Qatar are exploring options from South Korea, Ukraine, and Britain, driven by Iranian retaliatory attacks and US delivery delays. This diversification highlights global arms production strains and a shifting defence landscape.

title: From Rs 60 to Rs 60,000: Study reveals Jallianwala compensation scale, sparks ‘blood money’ debate
content: A study reveals Jallianwala Bagh compensation was calculated by income and dependents, leading to payouts from a few thousand rupees for deaths to under Rs 100 for minor injuries. This formula, linking life value to economic productivity, sparked public debate over "blood money" and colonial accountability.

title: 7th duck of 2026! Abhishek Sharma falls for golden duck against Rajasthan Royals
content: Abhishek Sharma was dismissed for a golden duck by Jofra Archer on the first ball against Rajasthan Royals. This marked his seventh duck in 2026 T20 innings, the most by any player this year. He joins Shikhar Dhawan as the only Sunrisers Hyderabad batters to be out first-ball in an IPL match.

title: From middle finger moment to double over Gukesh: What is next for Nihal?
content: Indian chess prodigy Nihal Sarin brushed off an online opponent’s rude gesture earlier this year, focusing instead on his game. Since then, he has surged in form, reaching a career-high rating of 2723, winning the Menorca Masters, and beating world champion D Gukesh twice. He will now aim to qualify for the Esports World Cup 2026.

title: BCCI makes major IPL 2026 schedule change - Here's what's new
content: The BCCI has revised the IPL 2026 schedule, swapping venues for Gujarat Titans and Chennai Super Kings matches due to upcoming municipal elections in Gujarat on April 26. The April 26 fixture in Ahmedabad will now be played in Chennai, with the return match in May shifting to Ahmedabad.

title: Arjun Tendulkar spotted with wife Saaniya, sister Sara before LSG vs RCB clash - WATCH
content: Lucknow Super Giants, currently sixth in IPL 2026, face Royal Challengers Bengaluru after a home defeat to Gujarat Titans. Captain Rishabh Pant acknowledged the team fell short with the bat, despite backing the experienced lineup. Meanwhile, Arjun Tendulkar was spotted with family, having recently married Saaniya Chandhok.

title: Noida workers protest: Key issues, wages, and other demands; top 10 things to know
content: Factory workers' demands for a wage hike escalated into violent clashes, exposing deep-rooted anger over pay disparities and poor working conditions. The strike paralyzed traffic, stranding thousands and causing significant damage to public and private property. Security forces were deployed to restore normalcy.

title: RCB star penalised for 'disobeying' umpire during Mumbai Indians clash
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru allrounder Tim David faced a penalty for not promptly returning a ball to the umpire during their IPL 2026 match against Mumbai Indians. He was fined 25% of his match fee and received a demerit point for repeatedly disobeying instructions. This occurred after a powerful six altered the ball's shape, requiring a replacement.

title: Ctrl+Alt+Hire: How Delhi crime branch exposed high-tech remote access scam in police exams
content: Delhi Police's crime branch has busted a massive recruitment exam scam, arresting over 16 individuals, including four police officers. The syndicate, operating across multiple states, allegedly compromised Delhi Police and other Staff Selection Commission exams.  Involved insiders facilitated remote desktop cheating, demanding lakhs for guaranteed selections.  The operation has exposed significant vulnerabilities.

title: 'Mummy kasam, ek hi cap hai': KKR star's epic response to fan demand - WATCH
content: Young KKR batter Angkrish Raghuvanshi humorously declined a fan's request for his cap, stating he only receives one. Despite this lighthearted moment, Raghuvanshi has been a standout performer for KKR this season, leading their run charts. However, the team has faced a difficult start to IPL 2026, struggling to secure wins.

title: 'DL and TS': Hyderabad doctor with 'James Bond-like switch' on BMW arrested
content: A doctor in Hyderabad was caught drunk driving with a BMW equipped with a hidden flip number plate. The device allowed him to switch between Delhi and Telangana registration plates, raising suspicions of road tax evasion. Police discovered the manipulation after the doctor refused to provide details, leading to his arrest for drunk driving, cheating, and impersonation.

title: Who to be next Bihar CM? BJP likely to declare face for top post on Tuesday
content: The leadership change will mark a milestone for the BJP, which is set to get its first chief minister in Bihar, the only Hindi heartland state where the top post has so far eluded the party. Even so, party leaders have remained cautious in their public remarks. Dilip Jaiswal, a minister and former Bihar BJP president, said, "It is an emotional moment for us. We hope that Nitish Kumar will continue to offer his guidance to the new government."

title: AFI to take disciplinary action if athletes flout sponsorship rule
content: The Athletics Federation of India (AFI) has made it mandatory for athletes to seek prior approval before signing endorsement deals, citing a need to protect them from unfair contracts. While officials argue the move safeguards uneducated athletes from exploitation, sports lawyers contend federations have no legal standing to govern personal contracts, raising concerns over enforceability and confidentiality.

title: You could be inflamed for years without knowing it: Early signs and simple lifestyle changes
content: Chronic inflammation can be the silent passenger on your health journey, often manifesting as everyday struggles like fatigue and restless nights. This hidden menace may quietly elevate your risk for conditions like diabetes and heart disease. Awareness of subtle indicators—like constant weariness, nagging pains, and digestive troubles—is key.

title: 'There are two options': Hardik Pandya delivers brutal reality check after MI defeat
content: Mumbai Indians faced a third straight loss in IPL 2026. Captain Hardik Pandya addressed the team, emphasizing collective learning over isolation.  The team conceded too many runs, struggling to control matches.  Pandya indicated a need for rethinking strategies and potential tactical shifts.  Mumbai aims to halt its slide in the tournament.

title: How are 890 schools still running without girls’ toilets in Maharashtra?
content: While Maharashtra embraces AI-powered classrooms, a stark reality persists: 890 schools lack separate girls' toilets. This highlights a critical infrastructure gap, with a growing focus on essential facilities like functional toilets, safety, electricity, and campus maintenance to bridge the divide between modern learning and basic needs.

title: Footballer dies after robbers attack team bus
content: Ghanaian footballer Dominic Frimpong has died after armed robbers attacked his Berekum Chelsea FC team bus returning from an away match. Masked gunmen fired at the bus in Ashanti Region, forcing players to flee. Frimpong was shot, later dying in hospital. The Ghana FA called it a tragic loss, mourning the 20-year-old rising star.

title: 'Don't fear him': Pope Leo takes on Trump, says won't back down on war criticism
content: Pope Leo has responded to US President Donald Trump's criticism. The Pope stated he will continue speaking out against war, including the conflict involving Iran. He defended the Vatican's appeals for peace as rooted in Christian teaching. Trump had called the Pope weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy..

content: Doc Rivers is out as the head coach of the Bucks, but the franchise and Rivers are discussing whether he will move to an advisory role in the organization, sources said.

title: Rory prevails, becomes 4th to repeat at Masters
content: The green jacket is Rory McIlroy's again. He won the Masters on Sunday by one shot, becoming the first back-to-back winner since Tiger Woods in 2001-02.

title: Report: Ex-Canes DE Bain drove in fatal car crash
content: Former Miami defensive end and 2026 NFL draft prospect Rueben Bain Jr. was involved in an auto accident in 2024 in which a passenger later died because of injuries sustained in the crash, according to a report published on Sunday.

title: Free agent pickups: Need help at catcher? Here's where to look
content: catchers have posted a collective OPS 33 points lower than the league's average in the category this century . in the past 25 non-shortened seasons, catchers accounted for only 10 of the 625 total seasons with 450-plus fantasy points among hitters . a pair of youngsters have shown enough pop at the plate to poten .

title: Fantasy baseball news: Baltimore's injuries continue to mount
content: fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . the young catcher has started seven of the Kansas City Royals last nine contests and homered three times . his whiff rate is of concern, especially considering he had a 28.3% strikeout rate while with Triple-A Omaha last season .

title: Only Klopp, Luis Enrique can fix Real Madrid ... and that's a problem
content: real madrid face bayern munich in the second leg of their UEFA Champions League quarterfinal second leg . they are nine points adrift of laLiga leaders Barcelona and were knocked out of the Copa del Rey in the round of 16 against second-tier Albacete . if they fail to overturn a 2-1 deficit away at Bayern on Wednesday, they will face a second successive season without a major trophy .

title: Top 10 WrestleMania moments: From double turns to the end of the streak
content: "Showcase of the Immortals" has a long history of creating moments fans will never forget . we combed through more than 450 matches across 42 WrestleManias to rank the 10 greatest moments . the voting committee fought tooth and nail for tuesday .

title: WNBA trade grades: Grading Sky's latest move, Rickea Jackson's fit

title: Fight grades: Nearly every UFC 327 bout exceeds expectations
content: it's no secret that the UFC has been in a slump since the start of 2026 and in dire need of a fight card that could remind fans why it is the best mixed martial arts promotion in the world . there was one lousy fight on the card ( Dominick Reyes vs. Johnny Walker ). it will be largely forgotten thanks to Carlos Ulberg's dramatic knockout of Ji Procházka to capture the light heavyweight championship .

title: Who should challenge for Carlos Ulberg's championship first?
content: Carlos Ulberg knocked out former champion Ji Procházka in the first round at uFC 327 to claim the title in his 10th consecutive victory . the only problem is that he also appeared to have suffered a leg injury that could put his immediate title defense in jeopardy . here are some possible scenarios for Ulberg and athletes who earned statement wins in Miami .
